sprite

user_module.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/system.hpp"
00007 #include <boost/assign.hpp>
00008 #include <boost/bimap.hpp>
00009 
00010 namespace sprite
00011 {
00018   struct UserModule : Module
00019   {
00020   protected:
00021     UserModule(Loader & loader) : m_loader(loader) {}
00022     virtual ~UserModule() {}
00023   private:
00024   
00030     Loader & m_loader;
00031   
00033     typedef boost::bimap<std::string, size_t> map_type;
00034   
00036     map_type m_opers;
00037   
00039     map_type m_ctors;
00040   
00041   protected:
00042   
00044     template<typename Derived>
00045     size_t install_oper(
00046         std::string const & label, void (Derived::*memfun)(Node &) const
00047       )
00048     {
00049       return this->install_oper(
00050           label
00051         , tr1::bind<void>(memfun, static_cast<Derived const *>(this), _1)
00052         );
00053     }
00054   
00056     size_t install_oper(std::string const & label, h_func_type h)
00057     {
00058       // Register the operation with the program.
00059       size_t const id = m_loader.insert_oper(label, h);
00060   
00061       // Install the label and ID in the symbol table for this module.
00062       boost::assign::insert(this->m_opers.left)(label,id);
00063   
00064       // Return the ID.
00065       return id;
00066     }
00067   
00069     size_t install_ctor(std::string const & label)
00070     {
00071       // Register the constructor with the program.
00072       size_t const id = m_loader.insert_ctor(label);
00073   
00074       // Install the label and ID in the symbol table for this module.
00075       boost::assign::insert(this->m_ctors.left)(label,id);
00076   
00077       // Return the ID.
00078       return id;
00079     }
00080   
00081   private:
00082     size_t _lookup(std::string const & label, map_type & map) const
00083     {
00084       typedef map_type::left_map::const_iterator iterator;
00085       iterator const p = map.left.find(label);
00086       if(p == map.left.end())
00087         { throw RuntimeError("Failed constructor or operation lookup."); }
00088       return p->second;
00089     }
00090   public:
00091   
00092     // ====== Module API ======
00093     virtual size_t find_ctor(std::string const & label)
00094       { return _lookup(label, this->m_ctors); }
00095   
00096     virtual size_t find_oper(std::string const & label)
00097       { return _lookup(label, this->m_opers); }
00098   };
00099 }
